title: Foundation: shell + focus routing + List view + sidebar + e2e harness scaffold
description:
FOUNDATION for epic 682 -- everything blocks on it. Architecture-first per docs/design/tui-unified-app.md (READ IT). Do NOT split the shell across parallel agents.

Deliver as one coherent skeleton:
- Rename tk view to tk tui, NO alias: rename cmd/tk/cmd/view.go to cmd/tk/cmd/tui.go (Use: tui), update the command allowlist in cmd/tk/main.go (around line 50, view -> tui), note the breaking rename in CHANGELOG.md.
- Root model (internal/tui/app.go): App struct owning focus zone {sidebar,main,detail,palette}, terminal size, active scope, active view kind, and the view registry; Update/View route to children and pick the adaptive 3/2/1-pane layout by width (design section 3). Put adaptive width logic in internal/tui/layout.go.
- A View interface + registry + a single registerViews() seam (internal/tui/view.go) so later view ticks add themselves with ONE localized line. Interface roughly: Update(tea.Msg)(View,tea.Cmd); View() string; Title() string; Tab() string.
- Sidebar view-model (internal/tui/sidebar.go): smart views Awaiting / My ticks / Roadmap / Active / Backlog (driven by query.Ready/Blocked/IsAwaitingHuman/owner) + collapsible project tree (query.BuildChildIndex/Role).
- List view-model (internal/tui/view_list.go): port the existing tree render from model.go.
- E2E harness SCAFFOLD (internal/tui/harness_test.go): add github.com/charmbracelet/x/exp/teatest to go.mod; helpers pinning color profile + teatest.WithInitialTermSize + t.TempDir() seeded .tick fixtures + timestamp normalization; one smoke golden. Replace the global COLORTERM init() hack in model.go with profile handling tests can pin.

Keep model.go/roadmap.go in place as port sources (may shrink model.go; need not delete yet) so the app runs end-to-end after this tick (List + a read-only detail stub).

Shared Catppuccin tokens: internal/styles/styles.go.
acceptance_criteria: go test ./internal/tui/... green; root-model focus routing unit-tested with stub children (Tab cycles zones; width thresholds pick 3/2/1 panes); sidebar smart-view counts + tree collapse via Update; one teatest golden (launch 120x40 truecolor renders nav|list|detail, j/k move List selection, q quits); tmux smoke: tk tui launches + q exits 0
